tuning: E A D G B E
content:
...NIGHTSHIFT... by The Commodores
----------------..................

*from 'Nightshift' (1985)*


*CAPO 1st FRET*

(Original Key: G#)


Intro:

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]
[ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]G6[/ch]

Verse 1:

[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
 Marvin,     he was a friend of mine,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
And he could sing a song,       his heart in every line.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
 Marvin,      sang of the joy and pain,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
He opened up our minds,       and I still can hear him say;[/tab]

Bridge 1:

[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]
Aww, talk to me, so you can see; what's going on.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 Say you will, sing your songs, for-evermore, evermore.[/tab]

Chorus 1:

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Gonna be some sweet sounds, coming down, on the nightshift.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I bet you're singing proud, oh, I bet you'll pull a crowd.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Gonna be a long night; it's gonna be alright, on the nightshift.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]Em7[/ch]
Oh, you found a-nother home, I know you're not alone on the nightshift.[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]               ([ch]G[/ch])
You found a-nother home, I know you're not alone on the nightshift.[/tab]

Interlude:

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]

Verse 2:

[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
 Jackie,     hey, what you doing now?[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
It seems like yesterday,       when we were working out.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
 Jackie,  you set the world on fire.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
You came and gifted us;       your love it lifted us, higher and higher.[/tab]

Bridge 2:

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
 Keep it up and we'll be there, at your side.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Oh, say you will, sing your songs, for-evermore, evermore, evermore.[/tab]

Chorus 2:

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Gonna be some sweet sounds, coming down, on the nightshift.[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                               [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
I bet you're singing proud, oh, I bet you'll pull a crowd.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Gonna be a long night; it's gonna be alright, on the nightshift.[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
Oh, you found a-nother home, I know you're not alone on the nightshift.[/tab]

(Repeat to Fade)


CHORD DIAGRAMS:
---------------

   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G6[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
 320003  322000  022030  x32010  xx0232

  [ch]Dadd9[/ch]   [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Am7[/ch]

 EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE  EADGBE
 x54x5x  x3203x  022000  x02013
